title: Junior Backend Developer
description: HashiCorp is hiring a Junior Backend Developer to build and enhance infrastructure automation tools that thousands of organizations use to manage their cloud environments. You'll work on Go-based projects, collaborate with senior engineers, and grow your skills in distributed systems and infrastructure software.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain backend services and APIs in Go
Write unit and integration tests for code quality and reliability
Collaborate with product and infrastructure teams on feature development
Debug and fix production issues with support from senior engineers
Participate in code reviews and learn from team feedback
Document code changes and contribute to internal knowledge base

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience
skills: Linux command line and shell scripting

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and life insurance
Unlimited PTO and flexible work arrangements
Professional development budget and conference attendance
